content:
### NVDA / NVIDIA に関する最新Xポスト (2026-04-07 最新順抜粋)

1. **本文**: NVIDIAが約4兆円を投じてオープンウェイトAIモデルの開発へ🚀 オープンソース系AIに本格参入する動きが加速中。AI競争、ますます熱くなってきた！ #AI #NVIDIA #生成AI  
   **URL**: https://x.com/willwill0403/status/2041506900185936089

2. **本文**: $ZENA ZenaTech Initiates Plans for a Ukraine Testing Facility for Drone Testing and Operational Validation of its Interceptor Defense Systems https://finance.yahoo.com/sectors/technology/articles/zenatech-initiates-plans-ukraine-testing-123000860.html $TSLA $AAPL $NVDA $BTC $SPY $AMD $AMZN $MSFT $ETH $QQQ $GOOGL $META $NFLX $SOL $DOGE $PLTR $ASST $AVGO  
   **URL**: https://x.com/RJtrader69729/status/2041506913737748659

3. **本文**: $NVDA  
   **URL**: https://x.com/Abby_Baile32/status/2041506913427554622

4. **本文**: The macro noise is loud right now. Trump headlines. Iran. Tariff drama. But $NVDA's story hasn't changed. Here's what actually matters right now 🧵 Key levels: 🔴 Resistance: $180 / $184–$185 🟡 Near support: $177 🟢 Major support zone: $173–$169 📊 200 EMA Daily: $173.77 ... (詳細分析)  
   **URL**: https://x.com/gabz_investing/status/2041444056278941708

5. **本文**: 個人的には車にイマイチ興味がないので、やはり「移動手段」としての存在価値しかない認識。できたら運転すらしたくないし、寝て起きたら目的地に到着していてほしい。ただ、それができたら最高です。 NVIDIAが支配するAI自動運転　完成車主導のピラミッド崩す 日本経済新聞 https://www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQOGN19AX70Z10C26A1000000/  
   **URL**: https://x.com/hiropi_fx/status/2041324779639349665

6. **本文**: NVIDIAが支配するAI自動運転　完成車主導のピラミッド崩す 「いつか、道路を走る10億台の車全てが自動運転になるだろう」。ジェンスン・ファンCEOは「CES」でこう宣言しました。 https://www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQOGN19AX70Z10C26A1000000/?n_cid=SNSTW005&n_tw=1775509256  
   **URL**: https://x.com/nikkei/status/2041268913942442494

7. **本文**: Broadcom confirmed plans to deliver chips to AI startup Anthropic using Google’s tensor processing units, or TPUs, offering an alternative to technology developed by Nvidia https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-06/broadcom-confirms-deal-to-ship-google-tpu-chips-to-anthropic?...  
   **URL**: https://x.com/business/status/2041276995833602350

8. **本文**: Nvidia $NVDA inched lower after an analyst warned its next‑gen AI chip production could be scaled back. Shares dipped to about $176.58, lagging the broader market. Investors are watching closely — any slowdown in AI hardware rollout hits the whole ecosystem. https://t.co/nCKqiUDBS9  
   **URL**: https://x.com/InvezzPortal/status/2041194561997787369
